title: neomolina brachyphylla
intro: Neomolina brachyphylla, also known as 'Golden Thread', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neomolina brachyphylla include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
